## Access Request

Thanks for requesting access to the Tempus Claude Code plugin repo. Please fill in the fields below so Grover can add you as a collaborator.

**Full name:**

**GitHub username:**

**Tempus team / department:**

**Have you completed the GitHub sign-in step in the installer?** (yes/no)

---

Once Grover adds you, re-run the installer:

````
curl -fsSL -o /tmp/tempus-setup.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/grovertempus/tempus-claude-bootstrap/main/install.sh && bash /tmp/tempus-setup.sh
````
